COUNTY OF MARICOPA)

Larry E. Sullivan, a Registered Land Surveyor, being first duly sworn upon oath deposes and states that (a)
he prepared the Final Plat for “Seville, Parcel 1” recorded in Maricopa County, Arizona, in Book 554, Page 19 |
(Docket 2001-0093192), (b) the Final Plat provided for a ratification and consent by the Seville Homeowners
Association (the “Association”), (c) the Association did not exist at the time the Final Plat was recorded, (d) the
inclusion of a signature block for the Association on the Final Plat was an error, and (c) the absence of signature by
the Association on the Final Plat shall have no effect on the validity of the Final Plat.

|
